entry.title: We have 12 papers accepted by ACL 2026

link.title: We have 12 papers accepted by ACL 2026

entry.content:
We have xxx papers accepted by ACL 2026: The 64th Annual Meeting of the Association for Computational Linguistics

San Diego, California, United States

July 2-7, 2026

Main Conference

Findings
